"}, {"fieldtype": "Section Break", "label": ""}, {"fieldtype": "Column Break"}, {"fieldname": "_custom_html", "print_hide": 0, "label": "Custom HTML", "fieldtype": "HTML", "options": "

Isambane Mining is a leading force in the contract mining industry with a strong corporate identity and a strategy that is geared towards client excellence, offering a reliable and high level of service.

Our Occupational Health and Safety, and Environmental Policy is to provide a healthy, safe and sustainable environment for all who may be affected by our business activities through establishment and maintenance of an Occupational Health, Safety and Environmental System at all Levels.

We encourage creativity and innovation and respond positively to the ever-changing needs of the market and expand its earning capacity on a profitable basis.

Send CV, certified copies of qualifications to:{{ doc.ir_submit_cv_to or "" }}

Closing Date: {% if doc.ir_advertisement_closing_date %} {% set cd = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.ir_advertisement_closing_date) %} {{ cd.strftime("%d %B %Y") }} {% endif %}

Isambane Mining is an equal opportunity employer and may utilize various assessments in order to determine the suitability of any applicants.

Applicants who have not heard from the company within two weeks after closing date of the advertisement should accept that their applications were not successful.

Applications are invited from passionate and performance-driven persons with a positive attitude for the position of:

{{ doc.designation }}

Job Purpose:

{{ doc.description or "" }}

Qualifications & Experience:

{% if doc.ir_designation_skills %}
    {% for row in doc.ir_designation_skills %}
  • {{ row.skill }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {{ doc.ir_experience_required or "" }}

Key Responsibilities:

{{ doc.ir_main_duties_and_responsibilities or "" }}

Note that applicants will be required to pass relevant assessments and meet Company requirements, including any relevant pre-employment testing and validations.
